ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., office, residential, public) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sensor is placed */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual experiencing the environment */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the individual (1 for male, 2 for female) */,
  "air_velocity" REAL /* Air velocity measured in meters per second */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature measured in degrees Celsius */,
  "radiant_temperature" REAL /* Radiant temperature measured in degrees Celsius */,
  "relative_humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity measured in percentage */,
  "outdoor_monthly_air_temperature" REAL /* Outdoor monthly air temperature measured in degrees Celsius */,
  "thermal_sensation" INTEGER /* Thermal sensation experienced by the individual (-1: cool, 0: neutral, 1: warm) */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_thermal_sensation FOREIGN KEY ("thermal_sensation") REFERENCES thermal_sensations ("sensation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thermal_sensations" (
  "sensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thermal sensation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the thermal sensation */,
  " rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the thermal sensation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_setup" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the experiment is conducted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., HVAC performance, thermal comfort) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_setup_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiment_setup ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., thermal comfort, HVAC performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of data access (e.g., research, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was calibrated */,
  "calibration_type" TEXT /* Type of calibration (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibration_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role in the experiment (e.g., researcher, participant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiment_setup ("experiment_id")
)
